buildCommand: pnpm --config.verify-deps-before-run=false --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --config.verify-deps-before-run=false --filter @workspace/zarith run build

headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version, Authorization
